subcodes.first_line: O servant of God! That which thou hadst written was noted. Praise be to God, thou art a believer in the Lord, thy Creator [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای بنده الهی آنچه مرقوم نموده بودی ملحوظ گردید الحمد لله مومن بحضرت پروردگاری و
subcodes.subjects: @transience; worthlessness of the physical world, @parents and children; youth; families, @consolation and comfort, @spiritual transformation, @love of God, @trust and reliance in God; turning to Him at all times, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity
